changes.value:
## What Dragging a file over the attachment field in the inspector shows no hover effect, and dropping does nothing. **Root cause:** `InspectorsContainer` (line 58 of App.tsx) is a sibling of `BoardContainer` (line 43-57), rendered OUTSIDE it. `FileDropProvider` lives inside `BoardContainer`. The inspector panels — where attachment fields render — have no access to the `FileDropProvider` context. `useFileDrop()` returns the default context (`isDragging: false`, no-op register/unregister). **Fix:** Move `InspectorsContainer` inside `BoardContainer` so it's within the `FileDropProvider` tree. The inspector is a visual overlay but it needs the same file drop context as the board content. In App.tsx, change: ```tsx
...
``` To: ```tsx
...
``` **Files to modify:** - `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` — move `` inside `` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Dragging a file over the attachment field shows the dashed border hover effect - [ ] Dropping a file on the attachment field triggers the attachment add flow - [ ] Inspector panels still render as overlays (positioning unchanged) - [ ] Board content file drops still work ## Tests - [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm vitest run` — all pass - [ ] Manual: drag file over attachment field in inspector, verify hover effect - [ ] Manual: drop file on attachment field, verify file is added"
File drop on attachment field broken — InspectorsContainer is outside FileDropProvider
